titleStmt.title: SII 31.130: original edition by C. A. Padmanabha Sastri and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 130. (A.R. No. B 198 of 1938.) ANIMELA, KAMALAPURAM TALUK, CUDDAPAH DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab set up in front of the Sangamēśvara temple.
It is dated Śaka 1514, Nandana, Adhika-Āshāḍha, śu. 15, lunar eclipse, corresponding to June 14, Wednesday 1592, A.D.

It records the gift of lands by mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Gangādharrāju Dēvamahārāju, son of Guruvarāja of the Kāśyapgōtra, Āpastambasūtra, Yajuśākha and Sūryavaṁsa for maintaining the worship and food offerings to the god Sangamēśvara. The gift is said to have been given on the banks of the river Aghanāsini Pāvani, i.e., Penna river. The gift is given by the donor while the king Venkaṭapatirāya was ruling over the country from Penugonḍa.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu .
svastiśrī jayābhyudaya śālivāhana
hana śakava¨rṣaṁbulu 1514 A
gunēṁṭi naṁdanasaṁvvatsara Atidhika
Āṣāḍha śu 15 lu śrīmadrājādhirā
ja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpaśrīvīra
veṁkaṭapatirāyadēva mahārāyalu
penugoṁḍastaḷamaṁdu vajrasiṁhāsanārū
ḍhuṁḍai pridhivī sāṁmrājyaṁ sēyucu
ṁḍagānu śrīmadēvādidēva dēvatāsā
rvabhaumuṁnuṁḍu saptaruṣavaradu
ṁḍaina Animela saṁgamēśvaradēvara Aṁ

garaṁgavaibhavālaku kāsyapa gōtraṁ
Āpastaṁbasūtraṁ yajuśmākhādhyāyu lai
na sūryavaṁśōdbhavulaina śrīmannmahā ma
ṁḍalēśvara guruvarājulu basuvarājugāri pu
tṛlu gaṁggādharrāju dēpamahārrājulu
gāru caṁdragrahaṇa puṇyakālalā Āṣunāśinī pāvani
nadītīramaṁdu sama¨rpiṁcci yiccina cēnu Ani
melastaḷaṁnu kha 1 puṭṭeṁḍu nu vari maḍi kha 9 paṁ
damunu vuttamastaḷaṁ yistimi . pūrvaṁstāna
mānyālu yarakalagoṁḍi cēnu kha 1 nu
gaṁgireḍḍi palyestaḷaṁ kha 2 su tōṁṭala gaḍtasta
ḷaṁ vanaṁsaha kha 1 naṁ rāyalavāru peṭina
ciṁttalacēnusaha kha 7 nu pūjacēśē jaṁgaṁ ba
suyavaku vēṁpamānistiḷaṁ rēgaḍastaḷaṁ kha 1 Inu
vubhayaṁcēnu kha 1 7 Ñ 2 Ñ nu sarvamānyaṁ / All/ All/ All
sēstimi . dēvuḷaṁ daggaravuṁḍē pōlaṁveṁbadi dēvuni pō
laṁlōnu pallenuṁḍi kāṁpula kaṭaḍakunnu sarvamā
nyaṁ sēstimi . yiṁduku tappaka naḍapa galavāramu
Animelanu cē
nukha 1 pāḷenamaḍi kha . 1 nu nayivēdya dīpārā
dhanalaku sama¨rpiṁstimi . yīcelumaḷlaku
mānagiri pārupatyālu śāyarādu dēvuni
mudra naḍapagaladi . yī dhaṁmmunku yavvaru tappināsu
saṁggamēśvarani pādālku tappulu . svadattādvigukāṁ puṇyaṁ
paradattānu pālanaṁ paradattāpahārēṇa svadattaṁ niṣpalaṁ bhavēt .
svadattāmvaradattāṁvā yōharētevasuṁdharā ṣaṣṭhī¨rvva
ruṣa sahasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatekṣimiḥ
sva
Digital edition of SII 31.130 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
